_comment: Terraform resource-type prefixes CONFIRMED to carry no billable AWS Price List SKU, ever, regardless of scale or configuration. This is a reviewed allowlist, not an assumption -- each entry must be independently verifiable (e.g. via `aws pricing get-products --service-code <code>` returning nothing, or documented AWS free-tier-unconditional behavior) before it's added. Do NOT add resources with a conditional or scale-dependent free tier here (e.g. NAT Gateways, VPC interface endpoints, CloudWatch Alarms above the free-tier count, action-enabled AWS Budgets) -- those belong in aws_resource_map.json as unverified/mapped-but-manual instead, so the coverage audit still asks a human to check rather than silently assuming $0.

prefixes.note: inline role policies carry no charge
customer-managed IAM policies carry no charge
security group rules carry no charge
the VPC resource itself is free -- subresources like NAT gateways and interface endpoints are NOT free and must never be added to this file
route tables and associations carry no charge
internet gateways carry no charge (data transfer through them is billed separately, not on this resource)
aliases are free -- the aws_kms_key resource itself IS billable and is intentionally not in this file
standard cost/usage budgets with notifications are free; action-enabled budgets beyond the first 2/account/month are billable -- re-review if a module ever configures budget actions
the subscription itself carries no separate fee (SNS bills publish/delivery requests on the topic, mapped separately as aws_sns in aws_resource_map.json)
